comment.body:
Alma’s appendix post today offered a lot more context to the dynamics in play. I’m planning to follow her advice here and not be biased in any a direction. She’s just shorting vol right now 

We have shades of improvement on a fixed strike skew basis but with price now below the 5565 level (JPM put strike) and the negative gamma environment we are still in (hedging increases in the direction of momentum) price can run down to 5114. That’s my interpretation. After March OPEX when the collar expires we will have a different gamma environment to analyze. 

Continue trading the successful way we’ve seen Alma doing in this environment. Observe price behavior at key levels and watch for signs of a reversal.

comment.body: This is an indi I have in development. (two parts to it, the 2 lower panes are a pair). This is breadth measured by percentage of stocks within each mkt above sma's). This pictured is just spx/ndx. I will include another screenshot of those along with dow and russell. with this decline and based on this calc we are more oversold than the yen carry trade last august. the indi will typically print signals a day or so after. just food for thought in the bigger picture. as with anything, we can be oversold and still get more oversold from there.

comment.body: One thing I’ve observed over the years is when VIX is trading above 20 for an extended period of time we’re - we’re now in a period of higher and higher implied vol. though Alma points out that RV is actually under performing IV of late, there’s still an expectation for higher and higher “risk”. The August selloff saw VIX over 20 for 6 sessions. We are now at 9 sessions with VIX over 20. Something to keep aj eye out for
